moments.title: World Cup Final Showdown
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final is set for Sunday, July 19th, with Spain battling either England or Argentina for the coveted trophy.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: Four days to go until the World Cup final! Who are you backing: Spain, England, or Argentina? The tension is building!

angles.name: UK Hopefuls
angles.copy: Could it be England in the World Cup final on Sunday? The nation holds its breath!

moments.title: The Open Championship Begins
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship tees off tomorrow, July 16th, at Royal Troon in Scotland, running through Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest
angles.copy: Get ready for the world's best golfers! The Open Championship starts tomorrow at Royal Troon. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Troon Time
angles.copy: Royal Troon is ready to host The Open! Good luck to all the competitors on Scotland's iconic links.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, promising a weekend of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Festival Feels
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just over a week away! Who's heading to Henham Park for four days of incredible music and arts?

angles.name: Suffolk Summer
angles.copy: Sunshine, music, and good vibes! Latitude Festival is bringing the party to Suffolk next week. What acts are on your must-see list?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The brand new Official UK Singles Chart will be unveiled this Friday, July 17th, revealing the nation's biggest hits of the week.

angles.name: Chart Race
angles.copy: Who's going to claim the top spot? The new Official UK Singles Chart drops this Friday! Any predictions for number one?

angles.name: Tune In Friday
angles.copy: New music and chart positions confirmed this Friday! We'll have all the highlights from the Official Singles Chart.

moments.title: Love Island Continues
moments.blurb: The latest series of Love Island UK is in full swing, with daily drama and romance keeping viewers hooked this summer.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of drama in the Love Island villa! Are you keeping up with all the twists and turns?

angles.name: Summer Love
angles.copy: Who's your favourite couple on Love Island right now? The search for summer love continues!

moments.title: Happy 80th to Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Today, July 15th, marks the 80th birthday of the legendary American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, folk, and country.

angles.name: 80 Today
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 80th birthday to the iconic Linda Ronstadt! Her incredible voice has graced so many genres.

angles.name: Music Legend
angles.copy: From 'Blue Bayou' to 'You're No Good,' celebrating the timeless talent of Linda Ronstadt on her 80th birthday!

moments.title: Happy 70th to Joe Satriani
moments.blurb: Instrumental rock guitar virtuoso Joe Satriani celebrates his 70th birthday today, July 15th.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 70th birthday to the incredible Joe Satriani! His fingers on the fretboard are pure magic.

angles.name: Shred King
angles.copy: Celebrating the master of instrumental rock, Joe Satriani, on his 70th today! What's your favourite Satch track?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74
moments.blurb: Tomorrow, July 16th, marks the 74th birthday of Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer of The Police.

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Getting ready to celebrate Stewart Copeland's 74th tomorrow! The powerhouse behind The Police's iconic sound.

angles.name: Police Beat
angles.copy: From 'Roxanne' to 'Every Breath You Take,' Stewart Copeland's drumming is unmistakable. Happy early 74th!

moments.title: Luke Bryan's 50th
moments.blurb: American country superstar and 'American Idol' judge Luke Bryan will celebrate his 50th birthday on Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: Country Star Turns 50
angles.copy: Big birthday coming up for Luke Bryan! The country sensation turns 50 this Friday. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Idol Judge
angles.copy: Happy early 50th to the one and only Luke Bryan! Get ready to sing along to his biggest hits this weekend.

moments.title: Brian May's 79th
moments.blurb: Sir Brian May, the iconic guitarist of Queen, will celebrate his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Queen Legend
angles.copy: The legendary Brian May turns 79 this Sunday! From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You,' his riffs are immortal.

angles.name: Red Special
angles.copy: Celebrating Sir Brian May's upcoming 79th! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

moments.title: Carlos Santana Turns 79
moments.blurb: The legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for hits like 'Smooth' and 'Black Magic Woman,' celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana this Monday! His guitar work is pure soul.

angles.name: Timeless Sound
angles.copy: Still making waves at 79! Celebrate Carlos Santana's birthday on Monday by cranking up some of his classic tracks.

moments.title: Cat Stevens Turns 78
moments.blurb: British folk-rock legend Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf / Cat Stevens, will celebrate his 78th birthday on Tuesday, July 21st.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 78th birthday to the brilliant Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam this Tuesday! His songs are truly timeless.

angles.name: Peace Train
angles.copy: From 'Wild World' to 'Father and Son,' celebrating the enduring music of Cat Stevens on his 78th birthday next week.

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder and drummer/vocalist of the Eagles, will celebrate his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Eagles icon Don Henley this Wednesday! What's your favourite track he sang?

angles.name: Hotel California Voice
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, Don Henley's voice is unmistakable. Happy early 79th to a true legend!

moments.title: Slash Turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' legendary guitarist Slash will celebrate his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Top Hat & Guitar
angles.copy: Happy 61st birthday to the iconic Slash this Thursday! That top hat and Les Paul combo is still rock and roll royalty.

angles.name: Guns N' Roses Legend
angles.copy: From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to his solo work, Slash's guitar riffs are instantly recognisable. Celebrate his 61st next week!

moments.title: J.Lo's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping music and acting career, will celebrate her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo Turns 57
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the incredible Jennifer Lopez this Friday! Still slaying on stage and screen.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: From 'Jenny from the Block' to her latest hits, J.Lo continues to inspire! Celebrate her 57th birthday next week.

moments.title: School's Out for Summer
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are breaking up for the summer holidays this week and next, marking the start of the main holiday season.

angles.name: Summer Break Begins
angles.copy: School's officially out for summer for many! Wishing everyone a fantastic and well-deserved break.

angles.name: Holiday Mode
angles.copy: Whether you're off on an adventure or enjoying a staycation, happy summer holidays to all the students and teachers!
